response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Rolling Girl'. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics from the Reference JSON were used for the song performance section. The introductory dialogue and on-screen text were manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly synchronized with vocal bursts. Aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions were applied during rapid-fire song segments to prevent cascading delays.
